title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js. Build real-world projects and land your first dev job.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master the art of user interface and experience design using Figma. Learn wireframing, prototyping, design systems, and usability testing techniques.

title: Digital Marketing Strategy
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, and Google Ads. Build and execute a complete digital marketing strategy for any business.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Dive into data analysis, visualization, and machine learning using Python. Work with Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn on real datasets.

title: React & Next.js Complete Guide
description: Build modern, high-performance web applications using React and Next.js. Covers hooks, context API, server components, routing, and deployment.

title: Graphic Design for Beginners
description: Learn the fundamentals of graphic design including typography, color theory, layout, and branding using Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.

title: Content Writing & Copywriting
description: Master the skill of writing compelling content for blogs, websites, and ads. Learn SEO writing, storytelling, and persuasive copywriting techniques.

title: Mobile App Development with Flutter
description: Build cross-platform iOS and Android apps using Flutter and Dart. Covers state management, Firebase integration, animations, and publishing to app stores.

title: Personal Finance & Investment Basics
description: Take control of your money with this practical guide to budgeting, saving, investing in stocks, and planning for financial freedom.
